name: Arnold Schwarzenegger
summary: Former California Governor and action movie star who became a vocal Trump critic, particularly on issues of immigration, the Capitol riot, and democratic norms, while maintaining his Republican identity.

keyStatements.quote: President Trump sought to overturn the results of an election, and of a fair election. He sought a coup by misleading people with lies... President Trump is a failed leader. He will go down in history as the worst president ever.
keyStatements.context: Video message after the January 6 Capitol attack

keyStatements.quote: I don't want to be associated with the people in the Capitol. I don't want to be associated with President Trump. I don't want to be associated with the people that made those speeches that riled everyone up.
keyStatements.context: Explaining his decision to call himself a 'European American' rather than a Republican

keyStatements.quote: To the men and women who would trade freedom for a pile of bricks and an immigration ban, I say: Your time will come. And it will pass.
keyStatements.context: Criticizing Trump's border wall and immigration policies

background: Arnold Schwarzenegger served as Governor of California from 2003 to 2011 after a successful career as a bodybuilder and Hollywood action star. An immigrant from Austria, he has been a Republican throughout his political career but has taken moderate positions on issues like climate change and immigration. He briefly hosted 'The Celebrity Apprentice' after Trump's presidency.
oppositionReasons: Strongly opposes Trump's attempt to overturn 2020 election results
Condemns Trump's role in inciting the January 6 Capitol attack
Disagrees with Trump's immigration policies as an immigrant himself
Believes Trump has damaged American democracy and Republican Party
Opposes Trump's rejection of climate science and environmental policies
notableActions: Posted powerful video comparing Capitol riot to Kristallnacht
Temporarily distanced himself from Republican Party label after January 6
Consistently defended immigrants and criticized border wall
Called Trump 'the worst president ever' in public statements
Used his platform to defend democratic values and Constitution

strengths: Two-term governor of largest U.S. state by population
Personal experience as immigrant gives authenticity on immigration issues
Massive public platform with millions of social media followers
History of bipartisan cooperation as governor
considerations: Mixed gubernatorial record with low approval ratings at times
Some conservatives view him as RINO (Republican In Name Only)
Personal scandals during and after governorship
Celebrity status can overshadow policy positions
